displayTitle: Star Wars (1977) #52: To Take The Tarkin
synopsis: Luke Skywalker, Leia Organa, and Chewbacca, along with C-3PO and R2-D2, have infiltrated the Imperial superweapon *Tarkin* to sabotage it. As they work, Darth Vader arranges a confrontation with Luke while a group of Imperial officers led by General Biel plots to destroy the Sith Lord. The officers' scheme fails, and Vader turns his focus to capturing the Rebels. Having crippled the *Tarkin*'s firing mechanism, the Rebels escape but are set upon by TIE fighters, including one flown by Vader. Lando Calrissian, having stowed away aboard the *Millennium Falcon*, comes to their aid. With Vader's fighter disabled, Biel tries to fire the *Tarkin*'s superlaser at the Rebels in hopes of catching Vader in the blast, but the weapon self-destructs as it fires, killing everyone aboard.
title: Star Wars (1977) #52: To Take The Tarkin
